elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1397 - Pilgrimage of Raymond Viscount de Perilleux et de Rodes, Chamberlain to the King of France. (Two versions of his narrative extant. Also in the British Museum a safe conduct from King Richard III, recommending him to the constables and marshals of the Kingdom)
